title: odontites odontites subsp. vernus
intro: Odontites odontites subsp. vernus, also known as Toothwort or Spring Toothwort, is a perennial herb native to Europe, belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Odontites odontites subsp. vernus include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, relieving congestion and reducing the severity of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
